# TecSecSolution

> TecSecSolution is a UK-based IT support, cybersecurity, and communications provider offering managed IT services, VoIP systems, business broadband, CCTV solutions, WiFi infrastructure, structured cabling, AV systems, and cloud services. We help SMEs modernise their technology, improve security, and maintain reliable, scalable IT and communications systems.

TecSecSolution delivers end-to-end IT and communications infrastructure for businesses, including networking, security, connectivity, and managed support services across the UK.

## Core Website
- https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/

## Managed IT & Cloud Services
- https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/managed-it
- https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/VOIP
- https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/CyberSecurity

## Connectivity & Communications
- https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/BroadBand
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/VOIP
- VoIP systems, SIP trunking, hosted telephony
- Business broadband and connectivity solutions
- Call routing, IVR, and unified communications

## Networking & Infrastructure
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/wifi-solutions
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/Engineer
- Structured cabling and network installation
- Wireless network design and deployment
- Business WiFi and guest network solutions
- VLAN segmentation and secure network design

## Security & Surveillance
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/Engineer
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/CCTV
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/Alarm
- CCTV installation and remote monitoring systems
- Security infrastructure and firewall configuration
- Network security design and perimeter protection

## Business Services
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/Engineer
- Business relocations and IT infrastructure moves
- Office setup and network reconfiguration
- On-site engineering and technical support

## Data & Asset Services
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/Engineer
- Data destruction services
- Machine and hardware disposal and destruction
- Secure decommissioning of IT equipment

## Audio Visual (AV) Solutions
- https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/AV
https://tecsecsolution.co.uk/Engineer
- Audio visual system design and installation
- Meeting room and conference room AV setups
- Integrated presentation and communication systems
